name: Alysanne Hightower
title: Lady Alysanne Hightower of Oldtown

relationships.timos-hightower: Her younger brother; she watched him die in the Great Hall moments before the chaos below claimed her too.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Watched him arrive at Oldtown's gates from a window above, unaware it would be the last thing she ever saw of the outside world.

summary: Alysanne Hightower appeared only briefly, a silhouette in a high window watching Prince Gaelor's vanguard arrive at her family's gates. She and her sister were pinned to the floor as the Great Hall dissolved into violence, and in the blind panic that followed, a soldier's blade found her. Her death, unintended and unremarked upon by the men who caused it, is one of Oldtown's quietest tragedies.

name: Baelenys Targaryen
title: King of the Seven Kingdoms
goals: Preserve the Iron Throne
Crush internal betrayal
Win the coming war
Keep House Targaryen united under his rule

relationships.jaery-targaryen: Trusts her more than most, but rarely lets her influence his decisions.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Formerly his most trusted heir. That trust has been shattered, and Visenor now faces exile or worse.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Sees growing potential in him and has named him heir should Visenor not return.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Respects his intelligence and has made him Hand of the King, though he still despises his constant opposition.
relationships.saera-targaryen: Increasingly distrustful, though he still relies on her for delicate diplomatic errands.
relationships.rhaella-targaryen: Considers her a political liability and the daughter of a traitor he has never forgiven.
relationships.vahaemon-targaryen: His exiled brother. Rhaella's secret letters to her siblings reignited every suspicion Baelenys has ever carried about his own blood.
relationships.malaenar-targaryen: His steady, unambitious brother — the one Targaryen sibling he has never had reason to doubt.
relationships.derrin-hightower: His oldest friend and, until his execution, his most trusted Hand — a betrayal that cut deeper than the poison itself.

summary: King Baelenys has ruled the realm through fear, strength, and absolute authority. The poisoning attempt transformed him even further, earning him the name 'Baelenys the Formidable.' Once capable of calculated restraint, he now sees traitors in every shadow. The revelation of Rhaella's secret correspondence with his own exiled brother Vahaemon shattered his already fragile trust in his children, especially Visenor, whom he struck down before the entire court and gave an impossible choice: kill his wife, or lose everything. Having named Jacaelon his new Hand after Derrin Hightower's treason and secret execution, Baelenys now moves toward war with House Tyrell and Hightower with the same merciless certainty that has defined his reign.

name: Baelor Targaryen
title: Maester
goals: Advise the Crown before its impulsiveness costs it everything
Prevent a wider war with the Reach
Guide Jacaelon, in whom he sees a reflection of himself

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: His great-nephew and King, who summoned him back from the Citadel after years of self-imposed exile.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: The King himself compares the two as kindred spirits — scholars and dissenters born into a family of warriors.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Greeted warmly on the road, though visibly horrified upon learning of the massacre at Oldtown.

summary: Decades ago, Baelor Targaryen forsook his own claim to the Iron Throne for a quieter life of study at the Citadel, earning a reputation as 'the argumentative one' of his generation — a title the King now pointedly applies to his own son Jacaelon. Recalled to King's Landing amid rumors of Tyrell and Hightower treason, Baelor arrives too late to stop Gaelor's bloody campaign in the Reach and rides for the Red Keep in open alarm.

name: Brandon Stark
title: Late Lord of Winterfell and Warden of the North

relationships.rickard-stark: His son and heir, who inherited Winterfell and its burdens upon his death.
relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Their houses shared an old, uneasy loyalty; his own father bled for the Iron Throne beside Baelenys' uncle.

summary: Lord Brandon Stark died quietly in his own bed while the royal court feasted at Driftmark, a small, undramatic death that nonetheless drew King's Landing's attention back to the North for the first time in years. His passing brought Princess Saera to Winterfell to pay the Crown's respects, and with her, the first real contact between Stark and Targaryen in a generation.

name: Cordin Poole
title: Grand Maester
goals: Preserve his position at court
Avoid the King's wrath
Offer counsel that offends no one

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Serves as his Grand Maester, though his counsel rarely amounts to more than agreement.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: A frequent target of the Hand's sharpest sarcasm for his fawning, empty flattery.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Openly courts his favor, hoping to curry goodwill with the likely heir.

summary: Grand Maester Cordin Poole has served House Targaryen faithfully for decades, and it shows in every carefully hedged word he offers the small council. He rarely disagrees with the King and even more rarely survives an exchange with Jacaelon's tongue unscathed. Yet beneath the sycophancy occasionally surfaces an uncomfortable truth, as when he coldly reminded the council that sons sometimes pay for their fathers' ambitions.

name: Curtass Whent
title: Former Sworn Brother of the Kingsguard

secret.note: Killed in the Dornish woods by a desperate kick from Ser Alester Dayne's warhorse. No search party has yet found what remains of him.

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Summoned back into royal service and hired in secret to track down and retrieve Prince Visenor, dead or alive.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: Ambushed him and Visenor's party in the Dornish woods, leading a hunting party of sellswords against him in a brutal duel that nearly killed them both.

summary: Once a Kingsguard whose exploits were sung about before most knights would dare dream of it, Curtass Whent left the order under circumstances the realm no longer discusses openly. King Baelenys called him back for one purpose: find Visenor. He very nearly succeeded, cornering Ser Alester Dayne with five sellswords in the woods south of King's Landing. The fight cost him his life at the hooves of his own target's horse, though the wider realm has yet to learn what became of him.

name: Darren Dayne
title: Lord of Torrentine
goals: Safeguard House Dayne's holdings along the Torrentine
Keep his children away from King's Landing's wars
Preserve Dorne's neutrality in the Crown's troubles

relationships.lorenah-dayne: His daughter, whom he has tried, and largely failed, to keep sheltered from the intrigues of the crown.

summary: The quiet Lord of Torrentine, Darren Dayne has stayed carefully out of King's Landing's politics for most of his life, content to let his daughter Lorenah manage House Dayne's more delicate affairs. Neither he nor his seat ever expected to become entangled in sheltering a fugitive Crown Prince, but that is precisely what his family's choices have made of them.

name: Derrin Hightower
title: Former Hand of the King

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Old friend and, until his fall, the King's most trusted Hand — a friendship he betrayed for a cause he believed was greater.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: The prince who exposed his treason, extracted his confession in a locked room at Driftmark, and executed him personally.
relationships.timos-hightower: His son, condemned and killed for a treason he never had any part in.

summary: For decades Derrin Hightower served as Baelenys' Hand and closest political adviser. After the poisoning attempt, he became the center of suspicion when the dying assassin allegedly whispered only two words: 'the Hand.' Confronted alone by Jacaelon at Driftmark, Derrin confessed everything: he had conspired with the Lord of Highgarden to poison the King, believing the realm could no longer survive Baelenys' wars and taxes, and that he acted for House Targaryen's future rather than against it. Jace executed him on the spot and disposed of his body at sea. To the realm, Derrin Hightower remains simply missing — his true fate known only to the King and his new Hand.

name: Gaelor Targaryen
title: Prince Gaelor of House Targaryen
goals: Prove himself worthy of Blackfyre and the throne
Crush the Tyrell-Hightower conspiracy
Lead the campaign to take the Stepstones

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: His loyalty has brought him closer to the king, who has named him heir should Visenor not return.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Frequently clashes with him, especially now that Jace holds the Hand's pin and keeps him deliberately out of the loop.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Frustrated by what he sees as weakness, though it was Gaelor who broke the poisoner's confession out of the assassin himself.
relationships.ser-saathos-maris: Trusted knight, mentor, and drinking companion who indulges his temper more than he probably should.
relationships.naella-velaryon: His wife since their wedding at Driftmark; he has found unexpected comfort and honesty in their marriage.
relationships.timos-hightower: Executed him personally at Oldtown to enforce the King's justice — a killing that spiraled into a massacre he did not fully intend.

summary: A natural warrior rather than a statesman, Gaelor's courage often outruns his judgment. His brutal investigation into the poisoning uncovered the dying accusation against the Hand, yet he concealed that revelation even from his siblings. After King Baelenys stripped Blackfyre from Visenor and bestowed it upon him, Gaelor married Naella Velaryon at Driftmark and was named heir should his brother not return. Sent to Oldtown to demand Hightower blood for Derrin's treason, he beheaded young Lord Timos Hightower when the boy panicked, triggering a massacre that slaughtered every Hightower knight present and killed two innocent Hightower sisters in the chaos. He returned home covered in the blood of the Reach, already eyeing the Stepstones as his next campaign.

name: Jacaelon Targaryen
title: Prince Jacaelon of House Targaryen and Hand of the King
goals: Earn Baelenys' respect
Protect House Targaryen, whatever the cost
Consolidate his power as Hand of the King
Build a powerful spy network
Bring Visenor and Rhaella home safely, in secret
Uncover the full extent of the Tyrell-Hightower conspiracy

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: A complicated love-hate relationship driven by a desperate need for approval — one his father finally granted him by naming him Hand.
relationships.saera-targaryen: One of the few siblings he genuinely trusts.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Once looked down on him and considered him weak; risking everything to save him and Rhaella changed that completely.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Their rivalry has only sharpened now that Jace holds the Hand's pin and Gaelor stands to inherit the throne.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: His closest friend, mentor, and the man he sent into mortal danger to save Visenor — a debt that haunts him.
relationships.derrin-hightower: Exposed his treason, extracted his confession in private, and executed him himself. Only the King knows the truth of what happened that night at Driftmark.
relationships.vhaemys-targaryen: The little princess who feels safest in his hands, unaware of everything he has done to keep the family standing.

summary: Prince Jacaelon has become one of the kingdom's sharpest political minds despite his young age. During the poisoning crisis he uncovered Rhaella's secret correspondence, orchestrated investigations against the Hand, protected Visenor despite publicly humiliating him, and secretly arranged his escape to Dorne through Ser Alester Dayne. He confirmed Derrin Hightower's treason with forged evidence and a confession extracted in a locked room at Driftmark — then executed the old Hand himself and hid the body at sea. Rewarded with the Hand's pin by his own mother, Jace now rules much of the realm's day-to-day business at his father's side, using fear, patience, and a growing spy network led by the pardoned whisperer Weylar Rocke to hold House Targaryen together while paranoia over what he has become quietly consumes him.

name: Jaery Targaryen
title: Queen of the Seven Kingdoms
goals: Keep the royal family together
Prevent Baelenys from destroying the family
Secure strong marriages for her remaining children

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Often the last voice able to temper the king's fury, though even she has limits to her influence.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Pinned the Hand's badge to his chest herself, telling him plainly that she is proud of him — a rare moment of appreciation for the prince.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Reminds him constantly that he is heir now, and that a prince wandering the city until dawn reeking of wine is unacceptable.
relationships.maela-targaryen: Actively arranging her marriage prospects, from Lord Arryn to the Young Stag of Storm's End.

summary: Queen Jaery rarely speaks during court, yet her presence is often the last barrier between Baelenys and complete fury. She quietly attempts to preserve what remains of the royal family's unity, steering her children's marriages and futures from behind the scenes even as the realm threatens to come apart around her. It was Jaery, not the King, who publicly recognized Jacaelon's new role as Hand — and who insisted the smallfolk, not the treasury, would not pay for Gaelor's wedding.

name: Lorenah Dayne
title: Lady Lorenah Dayne of Torrentine
goals: Protect House Dayne's neutrality
Shelter Visenor and Rhaella without dragging Starfall into open war
Watch over her distant cousin

relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Met him during his journey through Dorne and was later trusted enough to become his fugitive family's last resort.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: A distant cousin from another branch of House Dayne; her household's protection and her own network of eyes and ears likely saved his life.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Granted him and Rhaella sanctuary at Starfall, fully aware of what it could cost House Dayne if discovered.

summary: Young daughter of House Dayne, Lorenah met Prince Jacaelon during his journey through Dorne shortly before the poisoning crisis in King's Landing. That connection became far more consequential than either of them expected when her distant cousin, Ser Alester Dayne, arrived at Starfall half-dead and escorting the fugitive Crown Prince and Princess Rhaella. Lorenah took them in without hesitation, fully aware that neither Sunspear nor the Iron Throne would forgive House Dayne easily if the truth ever surfaced.

name: Maela Targaryen
title: Princess
goals: Keep control over her own future, marriage included
Protect Jace, even from himself
Enjoy herself without consequence

relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Her twin and his greatest emotional vulnerability.
relationships.ser-brannyn-vance: Her sworn Kingsguard shield; she took his honesty, then took far more than his opinion.
relationships.steffon-baratheon: Charmed by his awkward, oblivious chivalry at Storm's End, though she has no real interest in becoming his lady.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Named his surviving hatchling Jadefyre before his flight from King's Landing; the dragon was later gifted to her by royal decree.

summary: Born only two minutes before Jace, Maela shares an unusually close bond with her twin. Clever, charismatic, and naturally manipulative, she was gifted Jadefyre, the sole surviving hatchling from Visenor's ill-fated clutch, after the other two died of grotesque birth defects. Pressured by her mother to consider suitors like the aging Lord Arryn and the earnest Steffon Baratheon, Maela used a visit to Storm's End to entertain the Young Stag while quietly seducing her own Kingsguard, Ser Brannyn Vance — then drank moon tea in secret to ensure the night left no trace behind it.

name: Malaenar Targaryen
title: Lord of Dragonstone
goals: Hold Dragonstone quietly in the King's name
Remain above the intrigues consuming his brother's children
Avoid ever repeating his other brother's fate

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: His younger brother and King; he has never once challenged his rule, nor been asked to.
relationships.vahaemon-targaryen: His other brother, whose treason and exile still cast a long shadow over the family name.

summary: The eldest of Aenys Targaryen II's three sons, Malaenar chose loyalty over ambition long ago and has held Dragonstone quietly and competently ever since. Standing between a brother who wears the crown and one who wears the name 'Traitor', Malaenar's unremarkable steadiness has become its own kind of virtue — he is the one Targaryen sibling of his generation nobody has ever had reason to distrust.

name: Naella Velaryon
title: Lady Naella Velaryon of Driftmark

relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Her husband since their wedding at Driftmark; she sees past his bravado to the weight he carries as heir.

summary: Daughter of House Velaryon, Naella married Prince Gaelor in a lavish ceremony at Driftmark's High Tide, an alliance sealed in celebration even as the realm quietly held its breath over a missing Crown Prince. Warm where Gaelor is guarded, she was quick to see through his nerves on their wedding day and quicker still to earn his honest affection.

name: Rhaella Targaryen
title: Princess Rhaella of House Targaryen
goals: Survive
Protect Visenor
Reconnect with her family, wherever exile has scattered them

relationships.visenor-targaryen: Loves him deeply despite everything her family's name has cost them both.
relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Lives in constant fear of him, and with good reason.
relationships.vahaemon-targaryen: Her exiled father, whose disgrace hangs over her at court, though it was not to him that her secret warning was sent.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: Watched him nearly die protecting her and Visenor, and has called him a true hero to the realm ever since.

summary: Daughter of the king's own exiled brother, Vahaemon Targaryen, and wife of Crown Prince Visenor, Rhaella secretly wrote to warn her brothers beyond the realm's borders, a letter that triggered the greatest internal crisis within House Targaryen in a generation. Forced into the center of the poisoning investigation, she fled King's Landing with Visenor under Jace's protection, surviving bandits and a hired hunter before finding uneasy sanctuary at Starfall — all the while unsure whether her own blood makes her a traitor or simply a frightened daughter.

name: Rickard Stark
title: Lord of Winterfell and Warden of the North
goals: Rule the North well in his father's stead
Mend the old, uneasy distance between Winterfell and the Iron Throne
Win Princess Saera's regard

relationships.saera-targaryen: Welcomed her to Winterfell during his mourning and found himself unexpectedly, cautiously drawn to her.
relationships.brandon-stark: His late father, whose death brought the North and the Iron Throne back into contact after years of quiet distance.

summary: Newly burdened with Winterfell upon his father's death, Rickard Stark received Princess Saera's visit of condolence with the plain, unadorned courtesy the North is known for. What began as diplomacy became something warmer by the time he showed her the Wall, though neither of them dared name it. Rickard hopes the visit marks the beginning of a steadier peace between his house and the dragons who once fought beside his grandfather.

name: Saera Targaryen
title: Princess Saera of House Targaryen
goals: Maintain the family's fragile unity
Build alliances beyond the capital
Protect Visenor and Rhaella however she can from afar

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Frequently opposes the king's decisions and has grown increasingly wary of him since the poisoning.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Works closely with him and is one of the few people able to see through his composure.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Supported him during the Rhaella affair and helped shield the truth from their father as long as she could.
relationships.rickard-stark: Sent north to offer the Crown's condolences on his father's death, she found an unexpected, unspoken warmth in his company.

summary: Known throughout the realm as 'Cloud Eyes', Saera's mysterious gaze has only grown cloudier over time. Quiet yet perceptive, she commands unusual affection from dragons and smallfolk alike, and commands one of the realm's most valuable intelligence networks besides. Sent to Winterfell to honor Lord Brandon Stark's death, she lingered a full week longer than expected, drawn to the new Lord Rickard Stark and to a North quieter and more honest than anything she has known in King's Landing.

name: Ser Alester Dayne
title: Sworn Brother of the Kingsguard
goals: Protect Jace
Bring Visenor and Rhaella to safety
Honor House Dayne
Survive long enough to answer for abandoning his post

relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Best friend and sworn protector; carried out his most dangerous order without a single question asked.
relationships.vhaemys-targaryen: The little princess adores him and has not stopped asking after him since he vanished from court.
relationships.visenor-targaryen: Escorted him and Rhaella out of King's Landing under cover of darkness and nearly died protecting them twice over.
relationships.lorenah-dayne: A distant cousin whose protection at Starfall likely saved both his life and the fugitive prince's.
relationships.curtass-whent: Ambushed by him and five sellswords in the Dornish woods; the fight nearly killed them both, and only Alester walked away.

summary: Ser Alester Dayne is Prince Jacaelon's closest friend and sworn protector. Silent, observant, and highly capable in combat, he acted as the physical execution arm of Jace's plans throughout the poisoning crisis: uncovering Rhaella's secret correspondence, defying the Hand during the dungeon confrontation, and ultimately smuggling Visenor and Rhaella out of King's Landing toward Dorne. The journey nearly killed him. Ambushed in the woods by Curtass Whent and five hired sellswords, Alester fought through brutal, sustained violence — losing an eye's worth of vision, half his ribs, and nearly his life — before killing Whent in a final, desperate act. He now recovers at Starfall under his distant cousin Lorenah's protection, a Kingsguard whose unauthorized absence from the capital has not gone unnoticed by his own Lord Commander.

name: Ser Brannyn Vance
title: Sworn Brother of the Kingsguard
goals: Uphold his Kingsguard vows
Serve and protect Princess Maela
Bury a secret that could destroy them both

relationships.maela-targaryen: Sworn to protect her with his life; broke his sacred vows for her in a single night he cannot forgive himself for.

summary: Ser Brannyn Vance has served as Princess Maela's sworn shield long enough to become someone she trusts with more than her safety. That trust turned into something far more dangerous the night she asked for his honest opinion of her suitors and then kissed him. Wracked with guilt over his broken vows, Vance now carries a secret that threatens both his honor and his life, kept quiet only by the Princess's word.

name: Ser Brant Costayne
title: Knight of the Reach
goals: Survive the next clash
summary: A hard-edged knight of the Reach who appears in the record only in the worst moments, Brant Costayne is remembered chiefly for the violence he was willing to back with steel.

name: Ser Orwell Morrigen
title: Lord Commander of the Kingsguard
goals: Hold the Kingsguard together through scandal and desertion
Protect the royal family whatever the cost to his own men

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Serves him with rigid, unquestioning discipline.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: One of his sworn brothers, whose unauthorized absence protecting Prince Visenor has not gone unnoticed — and will not go unpunished forever.

summary: Lord Commander Orwell Morrigen has led the Kingsguard through decades of relative peace, none of which prepared him for a poisoning, a vanished heir, and one of his own sworn brothers quietly abandoning his post to smuggle that heir out of the capital. He says little, watches everything, and is running out of patience for secrets he is clearly not being told.

name: Ser Saathos Maris
title: Knight
goals: Serve Prince Gaelor faithfully
Keep his prince alive despite his own recklessness

relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Sworn knight, loyal protector, and one of the few people willing to needle him with dark humor even in the worst moments.

summary: Ser Saathos Maris is the sworn knight of Prince Gaelor Targaryen. Disciplined, dependable, and unwavering in duty, he represents the military backbone of Gaelor's authority. During the poisoning crisis, he assisted in tracking the assassin and later defied political pressure by refusing the Hand entry into the dungeon. He rode at Gaelor's side through the bloody march on Oldtown and the massacre that followed, and remains the one voice blunt enough to tell the prince exactly what he doesn't want to hear.

name: Steffon Baratheon
title: Lord of Storm's End
goals: Win the Crown's respect for House Baratheon
Secure a marriage worthy of his house
Prove himself beyond the tourney grounds

relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Demanded overdue debts from him before the whole court and was humiliated for his trouble; the insult still burns.
relationships.maela-targaryen: Hosted her at Storm's End and fell for her completely, entirely unaware of how little she returned his affection.

summary: Already famous in tourneys and duels despite his youth, Steffon Baratheon marched into the Red Keep demanding the Crown repay House Baratheon's old debts in blood and coin, only to be cut down in front of the court by Hand Jacaelon Targaryen. Weeks later he hosted Princess Maela at Storm's End, showing an earnest, almost childlike chivalry that charmed her without ever earning her heart. He remains oblivious to both humiliations.

name: Timos Hightower
title: Lord of Oldtown
goals: Survive the Crown's judgment
Protect his sisters
Preserve what remained of House Hightower's honor

relationships.derrin-hightower: His father, whose secret treason condemned him before he understood what was happening.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Begged him for parley and mercy; was beheaded by his hand regardless.
relationships.alysanne-hightower: His older sister, killed in the same massacre that claimed his life moments later.

summary: Thrust into Oldtown's lordship the moment his father vanished under suspicion, fifteen-year-old Timos Hightower tried desperately to comply with the Crown's demands. It was not enough. When Prince Gaelor arrived to claim his life as payment for a treason he had no part in, panic drove the boy to draw steel. He never had a chance to use it. His death, and the massacre it triggered, will be remembered in the Reach for a hundred years.

name: Tion Lannister
title: Master of Coin
goals: Keep the Crown solvent
Temper the royal family's costlier impulses
Survive the King's temper long enough to matter

relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Finds an unlikely, if uneasy, ally in the Hand's more measured economic instincts.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Dismisses his war-hungry proposals as reckless, and is dismissed right back.
relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Regularly rebuked for prioritizing the treasury over the King's pride.

summary: As Master of Coin, Tion Lannister spends most small council meetings being outvoted by princes eager for war and glory. He argued against pouring Highgarden's reparations straight into a campaign for the Stepstones, pointing out — correctly, and to no effect — that a war with no clear end is not an investment. His counsel is sound and almost never followed, which suits the realm's finances poorly and its wars well.

name: Vahaemon Targaryen
title: Traitor
goals: Regain some measure of standing for his name
Protect his daughter from afar
Survive the consequences of his own old betrayal

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: His brother and King, who exiled him for treason years before the poisoning crisis and has never forgiven him.
relationships.rhaella-targaryen: His daughter. Her secret letters to her siblings beyond the realm's borders reignited the very suspicion that nearly destroyed her marriage, though the warning was never addressed to him.

summary: Exiled from Westeros years before the events of the poisoning, Vahaemon Targaryen lives on beyond the Seven Kingdoms' reach, cut off from the family that once called him brother. His sons, Rhaella's brothers, remain in exile alongside him; it was to them, not to Vahaemon himself, that Rhaella secretly wrote her warning, a letter that became the spark that nearly unraveled House Targaryen from within — proof, as far as King Baelenys is concerned, that his mistrust of his own blood was never unfounded.

name: Vhaemys Targaryen
title: Princess Vhaemys of House Targaryen

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Admires her father without understanding the fear he inspires in everyone else.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: Deeply attached to him and often followed him around the castle before his disappearance; she misses him openly.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: Feels safest around him and clings to him whenever the family fractures in front of her.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: He promises her she will always be his most loved, no matter how many nieces and nephews follow.

summary: The youngest child of King Baelenys Targaryen. Sheltered from court politics, Vhaemys still believes her father can never be defeated. During the disastrous royal dinner she witnessed the family fracture for the first time, clinging tightly to Jace in fear, and she has spent the weeks since asking everyone who will listen when Ser Alester Dayne, her favorite storyteller, is finally coming home.

name: Visenor Targaryen
title: Crown Prince

secret.note: Hiding at Starfall with Rhaella under Lorenah Dayne's protection. The wider realm still believes he has simply vanished.

goals: Protect Rhaella
Avoid civil war
Reach safety without becoming a rallying banner for his enemies
Return home a king worth trusting

relationships.baelenys-targaryen: Once the king's most trusted child. That trust has now been shattered, along with two of his teeth.
relationships.rhaella-targaryen: His greatest love and the reason he gave up everything, including his claim to the throne, to flee the capital.
relationships.jacaelon-targaryen: His opinion of Jace changed completely after learning of his secret help — and the price Jace's friend Ser Alester nearly paid for it.
relationships.gaelor-targaryen: Often disagrees with his methods, though it was Gaelor who first argued Visenor should never split his clutch of dragons among the family.
relationships.saera-targaryen: One of the siblings he trusts most.
relationships.ser-alester-dayne: The knight who saved his and Rhaella's lives twice over in the woods south of King's Landing, at tremendous personal cost.
relationships.lorenah-dayne: Granted him and Rhaella sanctuary despite the very real danger it poses to her own house.
relationships.maela-targaryen: His sister now carries Jadefyre, the one hatchling of his own clutch to survive — a dragon he named himself before losing everything else.

summary: Raised from childhood to inherit the Iron Throne, Visenor devoted his life to scholarship rather than warfare. The poisoning crisis destroyed his faith that diplomacy could solve almost anything. Forced to choose between his father's trust and his wife's life, he lost both: Baelenys stripped him of Blackfyre before the court and struck him bloody, then demanded he murder Rhaella to regain his place as heir. Visenor chose exile instead, fleeing King's Landing under Jace's protection with Rhaella and Ser Alester Dayne, surviving outlaws, a hired hunter, and a sept full of silent sisters before finding refuge at Starfall through Lady Lorenah Dayne. His three dragon hatchlings, meanwhile, never left the Red Keep: two died of grotesque birth defects, and the sole survivor, whom he had already named Jadefyre, was gifted by royal decree to his sister Maela, leaving him — for now — without a dragon of his own.
